events.title: Workshop on Urban Flood Forecasting & Early Warning
events.description: Hands-on sessions on rainfall nowcasting, inundation modelling and decision-support for cities.

events.title: SnapFlood Community Data Drive
events.description: A campaign inviting citizens to contribute geotagged flood reports during the monsoon.

events.title: Seminar — AI for Climate & Water
events.description: Talks on machine learning for forecasting, downscaling and flood-risk assessment.

events.title: AGU — Urban flood-hotspot research presentation
events.description: RAFT presented work on extracting urban flood hotspots — referenced in press coverage.

events.title: VarshaMitra mascot launch
events.description: Public launch of the VarshaMitra mascot promoting community flood-data collection.
